message:
test(scripting): property-based tests for audit, manifest, sandbox modules

Adds 29 proptests across 3 scripting crate modules:
- audit.rs (8): ring buffer capacity, eviction, counting, truncation, monotonicity
- manifest.rs (12): permission checks, env glob matching, manifest parsing, defaults
- sandbox.rs (9): enforcer consistency, permission delegation, resource limits

All 122 tests pass in frankenterm-scripting crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
